key_points: Percentages are useful for comparing quantities with a common base of 100
Percentage calculations are widely used in business, statistics, and finance
Profit and loss percentages are always calculated on the cost price
Discount reduces the marked price of an item
Percentage concepts help analyse growth and reduction in quantities
formulas: New Value = Original Value ± Percentage Change
exam_tips: Always identify CP, SP, and MP before applying formulas
Do not calculate profit percentage using selling price
Write complete calculation steps in percentage problems
Check units and verify the final answer
